'''鈭歝h-j-b''' ('''kachajab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:naumkeag|naumkeag]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-j-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:naumkeag|naumkeag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-j-b
|-
! Lemma
| kachajab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichajab|thichajab]] || [[word:jichajab|jichajab]] || [[word:shichajab|shichajab]] || [[word:kichajab|kichajab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchajab|thuthuchajab]] || [[word:jujuchajab|jujuchajab]] || [[word:shushuchajab|shushuchajab]] || [[word:kukuchajab|kukuchajab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchajab|thuchajab]] || [[word:juchajab|juchajab]] || [[word:shuchajab|shuchajab]] || [[word:kuchajab|kuchajab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchajab|thuchajab]] || [[word:juchajab|juchajab]] || [[word:shuchajab|shuchajab]] || [[word:kuchajab|kuchajab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechajab|thechajab]] || [[word:jechajab|jechajab]] || [[word:shechajab|shechajab]] || [[word:kechajab|kechajab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochajab|thothochajab]] || [[word:jojochajab|jojochajab]] || [[word:shoshochajab|shoshochajab]] || [[word:kokochajab|kokochajab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochajab|thochajab]] || [[word:jochajab|jochajab]] || [[word:shochajab|shochajab]] || [[word:kochajab|kochajab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochajab|thochajab]] || [[word:jochajab|jochajab]] || [[word:shochajab|shochajab]] || [[word:kochajab|kochajab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chajab|chajab]] || [[word:chajab|chajab]] || [[word:chajab|chajab]] || [[word:chajab|chajab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chajab|chajab]] || [[word:chajab|chajab]] || [[word:chajab|chajab]] || [[word:chajab|chajab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chajab|chajab]] || [[word:chajab|chajab]] || [[word:chajab|chajab]] || [[word:chajab|chajab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chajab|chajab]] || [[word:chajab|chajab]] || [[word:chajab|chajab]] || [[word:chajab|chajab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chajab|th忙chajab]] || [[word:j忙chajab|j忙chajab]] || [[word:sh忙chajab|sh忙chajab]] || [[word:k忙chajab|k忙chajab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachajab|thathachajab]] || [[word:jajachajab|jajachajab]] || [[word:shashachajab|shashachajab]] || [[word:kakachajab|kakachajab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachajab|thachajab]] || [[word:jachajab|jachajab]] || [[word:shachajab|shachajab]] || [[word:kachajab|kachajab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachajab|thachajab]] || [[word:jachajab|jachajab]] || [[word:shachajab|shachajab]] || [[word:kachajab|kachajab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachajab|shachajab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachajab|goshachajab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachajab|gokishachajab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachajabn眉|shachajabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachajabnkn眉|goshachajabnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachajabn眉|gokishachajabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachajabsh毛|shachajabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachajabnksh毛|goshachajabnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachajabsh毛|gokishachajabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachajabro|shachajabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachajabnkro|goshachajabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachajabro|gokishachajabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachajabmu|shachajabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachajabnkmu|goshachajabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachajabmu|gokishachajabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachajabsher|shachajabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachajabnksher|goshachajabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachajabsher|gokishachajabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachajabng|shachajabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachajabnkng|goshachajabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachajabng|gokishachajabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachajabya|shachajabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachajabnkya|goshachajabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachajabya|gokishachajabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachajabyam|shachajabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachajabnkyam|goshachajabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachajabyam|gokishachajabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachajabn眉sh毛|shachajabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachajabnkn眉sh毛|goshachajabnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachajabn眉sh毛|gokishachajabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachajabn眉ro|shachajabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachajabnkn眉ro|goshachajabnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachajabn眉ro|gokishachajabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachajabn眉mu|shachajabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachajabnkn眉mu|goshachajabnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachajabn眉mu|gokishachajabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachajabsh毛n眉|shachajabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachajabnksh毛n眉|goshachajabnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachajabsh毛n眉|gokishachajabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachajabsh毛ro|shachajabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachajabnksh毛ro|goshachajabnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachajabsh毛ro|gokishachajabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachajabsh毛mu|shachajabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachajabnksh毛mu|goshachajabnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachajabsh毛mu|gokishachajabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachajabron眉|shachajabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachajabnkron眉|goshachajabnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachajabron眉|gokishachajabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachajabrosh毛|shachajabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachajabnkrosh毛|goshachajabnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachajabrosh毛|gokishachajabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachajabromu|shachajabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachajabnkromu|goshachajabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachajabromu|gokishachajabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachajabmun眉|shachajabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachajabnkmun眉|goshachajabnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachajabmun眉|gokishachajabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachajabmush毛|shachajabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachajabnkmush毛|goshachajabnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachajabmush毛|gokishachajabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachajabmuro|shachajabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachajabnkmuro|goshachajabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachajabmuro|gokishachajabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
